title: Grove - Mini I2C Motor Driver
description: A dual-channel motor driver module controlled over I2C.
sku: 105020010

# Grove - Mini I2C Motor Driver

## Description

The module is built around DRV8830 and drives two small DC motors.

## Features

- Two independent motor channels
- Current: 1 ampere per channel

## Applications

- Small educational robots
- Camera sliders

## Specifications

| Parameter | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Supply Voltage | 2.75V-6.8V |
| Communication Interface | I2C |
| Peak channel behavior | internally limited |

## Pinout

| Pin | Function |
| --- | --- |
| SDA | I2C data |
| SCL | I2C clock |
| VIN | Motor supply |
